title: How to Play ZXPong
seoTitle: How to Play ZXPong | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn the ZXPong session loop, rally scoring rhythm, paddle goal, and release-facing flow for Solo and World PVP play.
summary: ZXPong is built around defending your paddle, returning the ball, extending rallies, and improving match consistency.

sections.heading: Goal
paragraphs: Move your paddle to defend your side, return the ball, and keep each rally alive for as long as possible.
Longer rallies improve the quality of a session because ZXPong tracks rally performance alongside score and match outcomes.

sections.heading: Session flow
paragraphs: A normal session starts from the menu, enters the selected mode, runs through the pre-game countdown, and then moves into active paddle play.
After a match ends, use the game-over flow to review rewards, coins, and next steps before starting again or returning to the menu.
bullets: Choose Solo play for practice against AI difficulty levels
Choose World PVP when you want the visible release-facing multiplayer route
Use each rally to practice controlled paddle positioning rather than only chasing the ball late

sections.heading: Scoring and rallies
paragraphs: ZXPong rewards successful returns and uses rally length as a practical measure of consistency.
In Solo play, progression rewards are calculated from match summary details such as win state, AI difficulty, arcade score, and longest rally.

featureShowcases.heading: Start playing ZXPong
featureShowcases.summary: This page explains the first-session flow for ZXPong: understand the objective, start a run or match, and learn how progress is measured.
body: This matters because a player should be able to move from reading the page into playing without needing hidden instructions.
Players use it when they are new to the app, returning after time away, or checking the expected flow before a session.
bullets: Explains the route from setup into play.
Connects controls, modes, and progress surfaces.
Keeps beginner guidance practical and public-facing.

image.caption: ZXPong how-to-play artwork shows the player flow into gameplay.
